assistpool_alias_help: Human-readable key, unique within your project.
assistpool_initiator_can_assist_help: Allow the initiator to contribute to their own pool.
assistpool_active_help: Inactive configs reject new instance creation.
assistpool_no_configs: No assist-pool configs yet. Create one to get started.
apikeys_admin_keys_desc: Server-to-server API keys for admin access. Keep these secret.
apikeys_client_credentials_desc: Client credentials for C-end access with HMAC identity verification.
apikeys_delete_admin_key_desc: This will permanently delete the key. Any services using it will lose access.
apikeys_delete_credential_desc: This will permanently delete the credential. Any clients using it will lose access.
apikeys_credential_created_desc: Copy both keys now. The secret will not be shown again.
apikeys_admin_key_created_desc: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.
checkin_test_user_desc: Using your admin account as the test end-user
item_delete_definition_desc: This will permanently delete this item definition and all inventory data associated with it.
item_delete_category_desc: This will permanently delete this category. Item definitions using this category will become uncategorized.
item_add_valid_item: Add at least one item with a valid definition
role_write_denied_tooltip: Your role cannot perform this action
role_write_denied_toast: Your role has no write permission. Contact a project admin.
accept_invitation_sign_in_first: Please sign in or register before accepting the invitation.
accept_invitation_failed: Could not accept this invitation. Check the link or contact the inviter.
accept_invitation_success: Invitation accepted. Redirecting to the dashboard…
mail_field_target_hint: Broadcast reaches every user in the project. Multicast only reaches the listed IDs.
mail_field_recipients_hint: One per line or comma-separated. Max 5000.
mail_field_rewards_hint: Rewards are granted atomically when the user taps Claim. Empty list = announcement-only.
mail_field_require_read_hint: When on, users must open the mail before Claim becomes active.
mail_field_expires_at_hint: After this time the mail is hidden and unclaimable. Leave blank for no expiry.
mail_error_recipients_required: At least one recipient is required for multicast.
mail_revoke_confirm_desc: Users will no longer see this mail. Claim history is preserved.
mail_delete_confirm_desc: This removes the message and every user's read/claim state for it. Cannot be undone.
shop_color_hint: Hex value used in tag badges (e.g. #ef4444).
shop_reward_items_hint: Growth packs typically leave this empty — rewards live on each stage.
shop_trigger_config_hint: JSON config — e.g. itemDefinitionId + threshold for accumulated cost.
shop_delete_product_desc: This permanently removes the product. Purchase history is preserved on item logs.
shop_delete_category_desc: This removes the category. Products in it become uncategorized.
shop_delete_tag_desc: This removes the tag and unbinds it from every product.
shop_delete_stage_desc: This removes the stage definition. Existing claims are preserved.
banner_field_alias_hint: Slug used by the client app to resolve this group. Leave blank to keep it as a draft.
banner_banners_empty: No banners in this group yet.
banner_field_target_user_ids: End user IDs (comma or newline separated)
banner_delete_group_desc: This removes the group and all its banners.
dialogue_field_alias_hint: Slug used by the client app to trigger this script. Leave blank to keep it as a draft.
dialogue_nodes_empty: This script has no nodes yet. Add at least one.
dialogue_delete_script_desc: This permanently removes the script and all player progress for it.
dialogue_error_start_node_invalid: Start node must match one of the nodes
dialogue_error_duplicate_option_id: Duplicate option id within a node
dialogue_error_bad_next: 'next' points to a node that does not exist
cdkey_optional_universal_code: Leave blank to auto-generate a unique string.
collection_delete_album_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this album? This cannot be undone — all groups, entries, milestones and player progress will be wiped.
collection_field_alias_hint: Lowercase letters / digits / - _, unique within the project.
collection_delete_group_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this group? Entries under it will be moved to ungrouped.
collection_entry_description: Bind an item definition — players unlock this entry when their owned quantity reaches the threshold.
collection_delete_entry_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this entry? Players' unlock progress for it will be cleared.
collection_entry_trigger_hint: Players unlock when owned quantity reaches the threshold.
collection_milestone_description: Configure unlock rewards: by a specific entry, by collecting a group, or by collecting across the whole album.
collection_delete_milestone_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this milestone? Players who already claimed it keep their records.
collection_milestone_scope_locked: Scope cannot be changed after creation
collection_milestone_error_no_reward: Please add at least one reward item
collection_milestone_error_reward_def: Please choose an item for every reward row
collection_milestone_error_entry_require: Entry is required when scope = entry
collection_milestone_error_group_require: Group is required when scope = group
collection_rescan_hint: Scan the player's inventory and backfill missed unlocks (mail is NOT re-sent).
invite_settings_enabled_desc: When off, all bind/qualify calls for this tenant are rejected.
invite_settings_code_length_desc: Character count for new codes (no separators). Existing codes are unchanged.
invite_settings_allow_self_invite_desc: Allow inviter = invitee (off by default to prevent abuse).
invite_no_settings: No invite settings configured; using defaults (enabled / length 8 / self-invite off).
invite_delete_desc: The invitee can be bound again. Task rewards already granted will NOT be auto-rolled back.
entity_delete_schema_desc: This will permanently delete the schema and all associated blueprints, skins, and instances.
entity_delete_blueprint_desc: This will permanently delete the blueprint and all associated skins and instances.
entity_delete_skin_desc: This will permanently delete this skin.
entity_delete_formation_desc: This will permanently delete this formation config and all player formations using it.
level_delete_config_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this config? All stages, levels and player progress will be wiped.
level_delete_stage_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this stage? Levels under it will lose their stage reference.
level_delete_level_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this level? Player progress for it will be wiped.
task_visibility_hint: Who can see and progress this task. Broadcast = all users; Assigned = only users with an active assignment row.
task_default_ttl_hint: If an assignTask call doesn't provide expiresAt or ttlSeconds, this value is used. Leave blank for no default expiry.
task_assign_broadcast_notice: This task is configured as Broadcast, so assignments are not required for users to see it. Assignment rows are still recorded (useful for audit / personalization tags).
task_assign_new_hint: Grant access to one or more end users. Existing active assignments are skipped unless 'Refresh existing' is on.
task_assign_ttl_placeholder: Override the default TTL for this batch
task_assign_ttl_hint: Overrides the definition-level default. Leave blank to fall back.
task_assign_source_ref_hint: Free-form tag for audit / tracing. Attached as source_ref on every row in this batch.
task_assign_allow_reassign: Refresh existing (update assignedAt / expiresAt on active rows)
task_assign_invalid_ttl: TTL must be a positive integer
media_asset_delete_confirm: Delete asset "{name}"? The object will be permanently removed from storage.
media_picker_description: Pick an existing asset from the drive, or upload a new one into the default folder.
media_picker_upload_hint: New assets upload to the default folder — you can reorganize them later in the media library.
common_link_activity_hint: Binding to an activity makes this entry follow the activity's cleanup policy when it archives. Leave empty for a permanent entry.
currency_delete_hint: All user wallets and ledger entries will be removed. This cannot be undone.
currency_alias_hint: Optional URL-friendly key. Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens, underscores. Unique per project.
currency_sort_hint: Lower values sort first — drives both admin list ordering and the in-game wallet display.
reward_entry_empty_hint: No entries yet. Click below to add a reward / cost.
webhooks_description: Subscribe external services to internal events. Up to 5 endpoints per project. Deliveries are signed with HMAC-SHA256 and retried automatically.
webhooks_no_endpoints: No webhook endpoints yet. Create one to start receiving events.
webhooks_create_desc: The signing secret will be shown only once after creation. Store it before closing the dialog.
webhooks_field_event_types_hint: Comma-separated. Leave blank to subscribe to everything. Use `name.*` to match any event in a namespace.
webhooks_secret_created_title: Endpoint created — copy the signing secret
webhooks_secret_created_desc: This is the only time apollokit will show this secret in plaintext. Store it in your receiver before closing.
webhooks_secret_rotated_desc: The previous secret is invalid immediately. Update your receiver before closing this dialog.
webhooks_delete_desc: All queued and historical deliveries for this endpoint will also be removed. This cannot be undone.
webhooks_rotate_desc: A new secret will be issued and shown once. The previous secret becomes invalid immediately.
webhooks_paused_warning: Auto-paused after {count} consecutive failures. Set status back to active to resume.
event_catalog_description: All business events this project can reference. Internal events are declared in code; external events are auto-discovered the first time they arrive via the client event endpoint.
event_catalog_empty: No events yet. Send an event via POST /api/client/task/events to populate this catalog.
event_catalog_read_only_hint: Internal events are declared in code and can't be edited here. Update the module's registerEvent call if the schema has changed.
event_catalog_inferred_hint: Fields shown here were auto-inferred from incoming payloads. Save to promote this to canonical and stop automatic field updates.
event_catalog_description_placeholder: Explain what this event represents and when it should fire.
event_catalog_fields_hint: Dot-paths that appear in payloads. Mark fields required once you're confident; rename or remove typos. Saving upgrades this entry to canonical.
announcement_delete_confirm_desc: This action is irreversible. Players currently viewing it will no longer see it on their next /active call.
announcement_field_alias_hint: Unique within the tenant. Lowercase letters, digits, '-', '_'; must start with a letter or digit.
announcement_field_priority_hint: Higher numbers come first. Defaults to 0.
analytics_users_coming_soon: Composition, active users, retention, and funnels — coming after the MVP.
analytics_modules_coming_soon: Switch between battle-pass, check-in, shop, tasks, leaderboards and more — coming soon.
analytics_activity_coming_soon: Full-picture view of a single activity container — funnel, point flow, sub-activity breakdown — coming soon.
analytics_logs_coming_soon: Request logs + event logs + trace correlation, powered by Tinybird — coming soon.
analytics_logs_subtitle: Event and trace queries powered by Tinybird. Left: event-type distribution over the past 30 days. Right: full event stream for a given trace_id.
analytics_logs_events_subtitle: 30-day counts grouped by event name. Source: Tinybird `tenant_event_counts`.
analytics_logs_events_empty_hint: Events appear seconds after an admin action or a player report.
analytics_logs_trace_subtitle: Paste a trace_id to see every business event emitted during that request.
analytics_logs_trace_hint: Trace IDs come from the `requestId` field in any API envelope.
analytics_logs_trace_empty_subtitle: This trace_id has no business events — it might be a pure HTTP request (only in `http_requests`), or the trace has aged out (180-day retention).
analytics_logs_fetch_failed: Query failed — please retry, or check the console for details.
dashboard_active_trend_subtitle: Split by source: platform signups vs. synced accounts
dashboard_module_health_subtitle: Core metrics per module (click a card to drill in)
dashboard_placeholder_connecting: Placeholder — auto-filled once Tinybird is wired up.
dashboard_tinybird_status_error: Not connected — the server-side Tinybird secrets may be missing.
dashboard_requests_trend_subtitle: Daily API requests and errors over the past 30 days. Source: Tinybird `tenant_request_overview`.
dashboard_requests_empty_subtitle: The `http_requests` datasource is empty. Data will appear seconds after the first API hit.
dashboard_kpi_error_rate_note: % of status>=500 over the past 30 days
storage_box_field_alias_hint: Optional URL-friendly key. Lowercase letters / digits / hyphens / underscores.
storage_box_field_interest_hint: Applied per "period days". e.g. 3% / 365 days = 3% annualized.
storage_box_no_currencies_hint: No currencies yet. Mark an item definition as a currency on the Items page first.
storage_box_delete_description: This will cascade-delete all user deposits and logs and cannot be undone.
storage_box_deposit_no_active: This user has no active deposits.
storage_box_deposit_lookup_hint: Enter an endUserId to look up all of their deposits.
storage_box_deposit_early_blocked: Fixed deposit not yet matured and the config disallows early withdrawal
shop_field_link_activity_hint: When linked, this product is only visible inside that activity's nodes. Leave empty for an always-on shop product.
task_field_filter_hint: Optional. Filters event data — only events whose expression evaluates to true count toward progress.
task_field_filter_syntax_hint: Uses filtrex syntax (==, !=, and, or, not, in, x >= y, x of obj). Use dots for nested fields, e.g. stats.level. Strings in double quotes.
task_field_activity_hint: When linked, this task is auto-included in the activity's task pool. Leave empty for an always-on task.
task_field_reward_tiers_hint: Each tier settles independently once its threshold is reached (autoClaim tasks send rewards via mail, otherwise users claim manually). alias must be unique; threshold must strictly increase and not exceed targetValue.
task_reward_tiers_parse_failed: Failed to parse reward tiers JSON: {error}
lottery_field_activity_hint: When linked, this lottery pool is only available inside that activity's nodes. Leave empty for an always-on pool.
check_in_field_activity_hint: Pick an activity to attach this check-in as an activity node. Leave empty for an always-on check-in.
banner_field_activity_hint: When linked, this banner only shows inside that activity's nodes. Leave empty for an always-on slot.
leaderboard_no_entries: No entries in the current period
leaderboard_field_metric_key_hint: Other modules call contribute() against this key; one key can feed multiple configs.
leaderboard_field_reward_tiers_hint: On cycle close, rewards are granted by rank ranges via idempotent mail delivery.
activity_lifecycle_invariant: Must hold: visibleAt ≤ startAt < endAt ≤ rewardEndAt ≤ hiddenAt
activity_node_create_description: One step: create the underlying config → mount it as an activity node. activityId is filled in automatically.
activity_node_field_alias_help: Node alias is unique within this activity; if the resource alias is left empty, this value will be reused.
activity_node_custom_description: A custom node has no underlying resource (refId is null). Useful as a placeholder or for purely client-side logic.
activity_node_entity_schema_help: A blueprint must belong to an entity schema; selecting one renders its specific fields below.
activity_node_alias_required: Please fill in the node alias first
activity_tick_success: tick done: advanced {advanced}, schedules fired {scheduleFired}, errors {errors}
activity_create_success: Activity created (status: draft). Publish from the detail page.
activity_detail_publish_success: Published — state will advance automatically over time
activity_detail_delete_confirm: Delete activity "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
activity_nodes_two_layer_node_desc: Per-activity toggle. Hides only this mount; the underlying resource is untouched.
activity_nodes_two_layer_resource_desc: Global toggle on the underlying resource. Switch from the resource's own edit page.
activity_nodes_two_layer_visible_desc: Node enabled AND resource status = true. Hidden if either is off.
activity_nodes_switch_tooltip: Node-level toggle: controls whether this activity node renders. Does not change the underlying resource.
activity_nodes_resource_tooltip: Status of the underlying resource (resource.isActive). Switch from the resource's own edit page.
activity_nodes_visibility_tooltip_intro: effectiveEnabled = Node enabled AND Resource active.
activity_nodes_delete_tooltip: Removes the mount only — the underlying resource stays in its module.
activity_schedules_cron_hint_suffix: . Stops automatically once the activity is archived.
activity_template_create_alias_pattern_h: Supports {placeholders} placeholders; the expanded alias must be unique within the project.
activity_template_create_field_payload: Template payload (fields copied to each new activity, JSON)
activity_template_create_payload_hint: Supported fields: name / description / kind / timezone / currency / milestoneTiers / globalRewards / kindMetadata / cleanupRule / joinRequirement / visibility / themeColor / bannerImage / metadata
activity_template_create_nodes_hint_intr: Each cycle auto-creates nodes per this template.
activity_template_create_schedules_hint: Seconds offset relative to the new cycle's startAt (used by once_at). Other fields follow the schedules table semantics.
activity_template_create_auto_publish_hi: When enabled, each cycle enters the timed state automatically — no manual publish needed.
activity_form_membership_hint: Optional. With queue enabled, /join assigns a unique random number per activity that admins can redeem.
command_palette_description: Type to search for a command.
rank_delete_config_desc: This permanently removes the tier config and all its tiers. Active seasons referencing it will block deletion.
rank_config_alias_help: Lowercase, letters / digits / -_. Unique per project.
rank_config_base_k_help: Elo sensitivity. 32 is a typical default.
rank_config_perf_weight_help: 0-1, extra delta from performanceScore. 0 disables it.
rank_tier_max_score_help: Leave empty for the top tier.
rank_no_configs: No tier configs yet. Click "New Config" to get started.
rank_season_finalize_desc: This freezes the season, writes the ranking snapshot, and archives the leaderboard config. Cannot be undone.
rank_no_players: No players in this season yet.
rank_no_matches: No matches settled in this season yet.
end_user_subtitle: Players of your game — managed here or synced in from your own system.
end_user_empty_description: Players appear here after they sign up via your game, or after you sync them in.
end_user_detail_sign_out_all_confirm_des: The player will be forced to sign in again on every device.
end_user_detail_disable_confirm_descript: They will be signed out everywhere immediately, and blocked from signing in until you re-enable them.
end_user_detail_delete_confirm_descripti: This removes the account, all sessions, and the password. Business data keyed by endUserId (leaderboards, inventory) is NOT deleted. This cannot be undone.
end_user_detail_toast_disabled: Player disabled and all sessions revoked.
end_user_detail_not_found_description: This player may have been deleted or belongs to a different project.
character_empty: No characters yet — create one from the top right.
character_field_alias_hint: Unique per project. Useful for cross-project script references. Leave blank if unsure.
character_field_avatar_hint: Shown next to dialogue bubbles. Square crop recommended.
character_field_portrait_hint: Optional full-body / half-body image for close-ups.
character_delete_desc: Dialogue nodes that reference this character will render as "character:<id>" and cannot be recovered.
dialogue_node_speaker_no_characters_tip: No characters yet? Create one under "Characters" first.
badge_delete_desc: All descendant nodes will also be soft-deleted.
badge_step1_title: Step 1 · Where does this badge appear?
badge_step1_hint: Pick the UI location (key + parent) and the visual style.
badge_step2_title: Step 2 · When does it light up?
badge_step2_hint: Bind the node to a signal, or aggregate from children.
badge_step3_title: Step 3 · When does it go dark?
badge_step3_hint: Choose the dismiss rule. `auto` lets business state decide.
badge_field_key_hint: Dot notation, e.g. home.mail.inbox. Cannot be changed after creation.
badge_field_signal_key_prefix_hint: All signals starting with this prefix are aggregated. Usually ends with '.' — e.g. mail.inbox.
badge_field_dismiss_mode_hint: auto = business state; manual = tap to clear; version = relight on new version; daily = reset at day rollover; session = reset on login; cooldown = tap hides for N seconds.
badge_field_visibility_rule_hint: Optional gate. See placeholder for shape. Node stays hidden when the player context doesn't match.
badge_inspector_subtitle: Debug why a red dot lights up or stays dark for a specific player.
badge_inspector_no_nodes: No nodes (or all hidden by visibility rules).
badge_inspector_no_signals: This player has no matching signals.
badge_inspector_no_dismissals: This player has no dismissal records.
settings_account_description: Manage your profile, email, password, and active sessions.
cms_type_list_empty: No CMS types yet. Create one to define a content schema.
cms_type_alias_hint: Lowercase letters, digits, dash and underscore. Used in URLs and as the API path.
cms_type_group_options_hint: Optional. Comma-separated whitelist that constrains entry.groupKey.
cms_type_delete_confirm_desc: All entries of this type will also be deleted. This cannot be undone.
cms_section_schema_hint: Define what fields entries of this type have.
cms_schema_empty_hint: No fields yet — add one to start.
cms_schema_evolution_warning: Schema is in additive-only mode. You can add new fields, but removing fields, changing a field's type, or making an optional field required is blocked. Copy to a new type for breaking changes.
cms_entry_list_empty: No entries match the current filter.
cms_entry_no_fields: This type has no fields. Edit the schema first.
cms_entry_schema_drift: This entry was saved against schema v{entryVersion}. The current schema is v{typeVersion}. Re-save to upgrade.
